items.description: Phase 3 PR 1 — orphan public-IP waste lane vertical slice. Two subscriptions; the lane surfaces 5 orphan public IPs (one of which has an unknown SKU — Basic/Dynamic — so its weekly impact renders 'rate unavailable'). The fixture's logical inventory also includes one attached IP that the ARG predicate already filters out, so the lane must not surface it. Cost-summary playbook output is intentionally quiet — the focus of this item is the lane output, not the cost narrative.
